title: Andreettaea herpestes
intro: I couldn't find any information about "Andreettaea herpestes".
taxonomy: Andreettaea herpestes is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, commonly known as the acanthus or thorny acanthus family. This family is a part of the larger clade of flowering plants, also known as angiosperms. The Acanthaceae family is often grouped into the order Lamiales, which includes other flowering plants such as mint and deadnettle. Andreettaea herpestes, along with other members of the Acanthaceae family, is further classified into the class Magnoliopsida, or flowering plants. The classification of Andreettaea herpestes into these higher taxonomic ranks reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants.
